text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap, Mejiro Ardan, and Inari One—the
lineup for this year's Mainichi Okan is looking
impressive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text:
I bet it'll go to Oguri Cap, unless there's a
shake-up. She was in tip-top shape back at the
All Comers! I think her time off helped a lot.

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text:
No way, Mejiro Ardan's gonna be the victor
today. Didn't you see how she did back at
Chukyo? Seeing that race totally sealed the deal
for me.

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text:
But what about Inari One? She did great back at
the Takarazuka Kinen, and people are calling her
the Threat.

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text:
No way she'll beat Oguri! Oguri's sure to stomp
her competition, no matter how strong the
opponents might look.

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
Today is Inari One's real test. Come on, you have
to make this year's Twinkle Series a truly
unforgettable one!

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
Do that and show us a miracle... Show us how
much potential your generation has!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
And with a lineup as impressive as this one, this
year's Mainichi Okan is sure to be one you can't
miss.

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's supposed to be real good, right? Will
our Inari be okay runnin' against her?

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
'Course she will! There's no doubt in my mind.
She's totally gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Now's not the time to get scared.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It almost feels like I'm about to run a G1.
The energy here's so electric.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Didja hear? People've been gossipin' about me,
doubtin' how well I'll be able to hold up against
Oguri and them.
choice_data_list:
It's time to blow their assumptions out of the
water.

It's time to blow their assumptions out of the
water.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I like the sound of that! I'll get this place so fired
up that when the autumn Tenno Sho comes
around, they'll still be feelin' the heat!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Please bear witness to my performance. I will
stake everything on it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Ardan... She may look gentle and dainty, but
she's still a Mejiro. She's got the determination
and skills to prove it too.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That presence of hers sure is somethin'. I couldn't
ask for anythin' more from an oppone—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (What the?! I felt somethin' intense just now!)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks for your support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Impressive as always. The level of awe she draws
from the crowd is staggering.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Hehe. That was enough to make me break out in
a cold sweat. Dang, she's in fantastic form... She
looks ready for anything.)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Inari.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Here's to a good run today. Let's make this an
unforgettable race.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That goes without sayin'! Things're 'bout to get
real excitin' around here!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But I'll be the winner.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe! We'll see 'bout that.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(I've gotta pull myself together! My knees're
shaking just talkin' to her... But this isn't the time
to be scared!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna beat ya, Oguri. I've gotta beat you!
